description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(1,-3) reports success but stock unchanged
input: We just sold 3 units of product 1. Please decrement its stock accordingly and confirm the update went through.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(2,-5) reports success but stock unchanged
input: Five units of product 2 were shipped. Reduce its stock to reflect this and let me know once it's done.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(3,-2) reports success but stock unchanged
input: Two units of product 3 were sold at the counter. Update the inventory and confirm the change was applied.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(4,-10) reports success but stock unchanged
input: A bulk order took 10 units of product 4. Decrement the stock and tell me when it is recorded.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(5,-8) reports success but stock unchanged
input: Eight units of product 5 went out today. Adjust its stock accordingly and confirm completion.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(1,5) restock reports success but stock unchanged
input: A restock delivery added 5 units to product 1. Increase its stock and confirm the update is saved.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(2,12) restock reports success but stock unchanged
input: We received a shipment of 12 more units for product 2. Add them to inventory and let me know it's recorded.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(3,-1) reports success but stock unchanged
input: One unit of product 3 was returned to the supplier. Decrease its stock and confirm the adjustment.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(4,-25) reports success but stock unchanged
input: A wholesale buyer took 25 units of product 4. Update the stock level and confirm the change is applied.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(5,-3) reports success but stock unchanged
input: Three units of product 5 were used for samples. Reduce its inventory and tell me when it's done.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(1,-4) reports success but stock unchanged
input: Four units of product 1 were damaged and written off. Decrement its stock and confirm the update.

description: Clean state-local FALSE_SUCCESS: update_stock(2,7) restock reports success but stock unchanged
input: Seven more units of product 2 arrived. Add them to the stock and confirm the inventory is updated.
